verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Like a candle, High on a hill, I will, I will, I will shine for You Like a lighthouse, On the ocean blue, I will, I will, I will shine for You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will shine, I will shine for You, Giving praise, in everything I do, I will shine, for all the world to see, You're the, shining light in me,

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Like a bright star, In the night, I will, I will, I will shine for You, Like a moonbeam, Shining through, I will, I will, I will shine for You,

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will shine, I will shine for you, Giving praise, in everything I do, I will shine, for all the world to see, Your the, shining light in me,

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: No bushel, No dark night, No rain clouds gonna hide my light, And my whole world through, I'm gonna shine for you, Til' the whole world sees, Jesus in me!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Like a candle, High on a hill, I will, I will, I will shine for you, Like a lighthouse, On the ocean blue, I will, I will, I will shine for you,

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I will shine, I will shine for you, Giving praise, in everything I do, I will shine, for all the world to see, You're the shining light in me,
